cozy_hot_cocoa.name: Mug of Hot Cocoa
cozy_hot_cocoa.description: Marshmallows and warmth; a sip mends scrapes and spirits alike.

cozy_acorn_tea.name: Acorn Tea
cozy_acorn_tea.description: Steeped by firelight; it settles the mind and refills the well of magic.

cozy_quilted_cloak.name: Quilted Patchwork Cloak
cozy_quilted_cloak.description: Stitched from a hundred kind hands; softer than armor, somehow tougher.

cozy_soothing_balm.name: Soothing Herb Balm
cozy_soothing_balm.description: Lavender and mint that chase off stings, rashes, and bad moods.

cozy_heart_of_hearth.name: Heart of the Hearth
cozy_heart_of_hearth.description: A warm ember that never fades. Home, made small enough to carry.
